#set page(margin: 1in)
#set text(font: "New Computer Modern", size: 11pt)

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[String Theory in Two Dimensions]
  #v(1em)
  Source-backed arXiv sample
  #v(1em)
])

#block(inset: (x: 2em))[
  *Abstract*\
  I review some of the recent progress in two-dimensional string theory, which is formulated as a sum over surfaces embedded in one dimension.
]

= Source Metadata
This sample is based on arXiv record `hep-th/9108019`. Authors: Igor R. Klebanov.
